en: At the moment that I thought I was having a premonition, suddenly everything went black.

ja_transcribed: 「[苦|にが]いんなら、いらないよ」「[飲|の]みなさい！」「[苦|にが]いのは[嫌|いや]なの」
en: "If it's bitter, I don't want it." "Drink it!" "I don't like anything bitter."
